scripts.db:reset: podman exec -i freezer-tracking-db-1 psql -U freezer_tracking -d freezer_tracking -c "DROP SCHEMA public CASCADE; CREATE SCHEMA public;"
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,api -c "cyan,green" "dotenv -e .env.web -- npm --prefix apps/web run dev" "dotenv -e .env.api -- ./apps/api/gradlew -p apps/api bootRun"
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n web,api -c "cyan,green" "dotenv -e .env.web -- npm --prefix apps/web run start" "dotenv -e .env.api -- ./apps/api/gradlew -p apps/api bootRun"
